description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for MASN+
AND the user launches the MLB.tv Core app

*NOTE:* 
MASN+ entitlement = MASN_110

MASN Test users: [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/15fajYxYv0k04eO4aKGtXxWVPABEvgaK26Jt5OoQBC6Y/edit?usp=sharing|https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/15fajYxYv0k04eO4aKGtXxWVPABEvgaK26Jt5OoQBC6Y/edit?usp=sharing|smart-link]

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the [MASN] tab in the header
steps.result:
THEN the MASN+ page loads successfully
AND MASN+ content is present in the Hero
AND a title is present in the Hero
AND a description is present in the Hero
AND a MASN related background image is present in the Featured Image space
AND text "PRESENTED BY" is displayed below the Hero content description
AND the presented by Logo is displayed below the "PRESENTED BY" text
AND MASN related carousels are displayed
AND VOD cards are displayed in the carousels for available VOD content

**NOTE:** "Presented By" and logo are feature flagged and may not display based on the set value. This can be checked in one of the following (based on environment) "base.json", "dev.json", "qa.json", "prod.json". Path: rsn -> masn -> enabled
